description: NPM Audit Exception Configuration - Documents accepted security vulnerabilities with mitigation strategies

build-and-dev-tooling.reason: These advisories only affect transitive dev/build tooling (eslint, cyclonedx, electron-builder, electron-node-gyp, app-builder-lib, cacache, etc.) and do not impact runtime code in the packaged Electron app.
mitigation: All affected packages are only used during development, packaging, or static analysis, not at runtime in the Electron app.
Electron production bundles do not ship npm tooling, node-gyp, app-builder-lib, or electron-builder internals.
Electron auto-updates use signed artifacts; end users never execute npm or node-gyp directly.
Build and CI environments are treated as trusted and isolated.
We will upgrade tooling (electron-builder, eslint stack, cyclonedx-npm, etc.) as compatible patched versions become available.
alternatives: Track and adopt newer versions of electron-builder/app-builder-lib that pull in fixed tar/glob/minimatch.
Track and adopt newer versions of eslint and @develar/schema-utils that pull in patched ajv/js-yaml.
Reevaluate use of cyclonedx-npm and textlint once their dependency trees are fully patched.
actionItems: Re-run npm audit monthly and attempt dependency upgrades that remove these transitive dev-time vulnerabilities.
Revisit this exception set before expiry date (2026-08-25).

svelte-ssr-only.reason: Previously tracked Svelte SSR-only advisories; all fixed or no longer reported for current toolchain. Keeping the bucket for future dev-only SSR issues if they reappear.
